title: NIA Jaipur & Panchkula – Professor, Accountant and More – 49 Posts
shortInfo: National Institute of Ayurveda (NIA Jaipur & Panchkula) Recruitment 2026 for 49 posts of Professor. Candidates with Post-Graduate Degree, B.Sc, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 11-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIA Jaipur & Panchkula official website nia.nic.in.

basic_details.job_title: NIA Jaipur & Panchkula Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 49 Professor, Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Ayurveda (NIA Jaipur & Panchkula) Recruitment 2026 for 49 posts of Professor. Candidates with Post-Graduate Degree, B.Sc, Diploma Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 11-05-2026, and closes on 20-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIA Jaipur & Panchkula official website nia.nic.in.
basic_details.job_type: Direct Recruitment and/or Deputation Including Short Term Contract

age_limit.age_details: Max: 55 Years for Professor, 50 Years for Associate Professor, 40 Years for Assistant Professor, 40 Years for Medical Officer, 56 Years for Deputy Director, 30 Years for Accountant and Nursing Officer, 35 Years for Librarian. Crucial Date: 20-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduate Degree in Ayurveda, 15 Years Teaching Experience, Minimum 10 Research Publications, Working knowledge of Computer and AI.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 13 (Rs. 1,23,100-2,15,900) for Professor, Pay Level 12 (Rs.78,800-2,09,200) for Associate Professor, Pay Level 10 (Rs.56,100-1,77,500) for Assistant Professor, Medical Officer, Panchakarma Vaidya, Radiologist, Pay Level 6 (Rs. 35,400-1,12,400) for Accountant and Jr. Translation Officer, Pay Level 7 (Rs.44,900-1,42,400) for Nursing Officer and Librarian, Pay Level 11 (Rs.67,700-2,08,700) for Deputy Director.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIA Jaipur & Panchkula Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
